summary: @akshay_pachaar: Web scraping will never be the same. (100% open-source visual search at scale) PixelRAG is a retrieval system that skips
whyItMatters: Web scraping will never be the same. (100% open-source visual search at scale) PixelRAG is a retrieval system that skips HTML parsing completely. Instead of scraping a page into text and embedding chunks, it screenshots the page and retrieves the image. A vision-language model reads the answer straight off the pixels. Why that matters: parsing is where web…
